# hooks-revParse

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query query hook for revParse

## Usage

```typescript
useRevParseQuery({ dbId: '<value>', storeId: '<value>', refname: '<value>' })
```

## Examples

### Use useRevParseQuery

```typescript
const { data, isLoading } = useRevParseQuery({ dbId: '<value>', storeId: '<value>', refname: '<value>' });
```
